name: agentic-metacognition
postCreateCommand: python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m pip install ipykernel && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/github/gh-aw/v0.67.1/install-gh-aw.sh -o /tmp/install-gh-aw.sh && bash /tmp/install-gh-aw.sh v0.67.1 && rm -f /tmp/install-gh-aw.sh
